notes: Batch-D: 67 entries. Classification: 61 UI translations + 4 telemetry_payload (safe_warn! in notebooks/file/mod.rs L449/450/475/476 → log::warn sink) + 2 panic_message (.expect on workflow_view L578, global_search L1592). 'Warp Agent' kept as glossary brand. 'Warp Drive' / 'Oz' / 'Agent' / 'MCP' / 'Claude Code' / 'Codex' / 'Gemini CLI' / 'Business' / 'SSH' / 'Git Bash' / 'WSL' / 'gitignore' / 'OpenAI' / 'Anthropic' / 'Google' preserved as-is. ASCII '...' converted to '……' (Loading {}...). Toast messages use 您 register. {placeholder} preserved verbatim including ${price}. Note '...build (feature "local_fs" disabled)' (4th telemetry entry) keeps embedded escaped quotes and the period as in source — null target so no concern.
